_comment: NOTE: needs seeder agents_fleet_with_runs. Realistic shape for /api/agents fleet list with runs (7d), success rate, spend, and last_run_at populated. Pair with fixtures/agent-runs-list.json for the runs tab and fixtures/agent-fleet-stats.json for the top stat row.

items.name: Ticket Triage Agent
items.description: Reads inbound ticket descriptions and classifies priority, category, and routing target.
items.system_prompt: You are a triage assistant. Classify tickets by priority, category, and route them to the right team.

items.name: M365 License Inspector
items.description: Audits Microsoft 365 license assignments per user and flags unused seats.
items.system_prompt: Inspect Microsoft 365 licenses. Find unused seats and recommend reclamation.

items.name: Onboarding Coordinator
items.description: Orchestrates new-employee provisioning. Delegates to identity, hardware, and workspace agents.
items.system_prompt: Coordinate onboarding across identity, hardware, and workspace setup.

items.name: Backup Compliance Auditor
items.description: Walks the daily backup report, flags failures, and creates remediation tickets.
items.system_prompt: Audit backup completion and remediate failures.

items.name: Knowledge Search Agent
items.description: Answers FAQ-style questions from the internal docs namespace.
items.system_prompt: Answer questions from the internal docs namespace.
